title: Browser Automation Smoke
objective: Start OpenClaw's real browser automation surface, open a managed browser tab, capture browser state, stop the profile, and verify the gateway remains healthy.

phases.title: Gateway Start
phases.intent: Start the gateway and prove it is healthy before browser automation.

phases.title: Browser Automation Smoke
phases.intent: Use OpenClaw's browser CLI to start a managed headless profile, open a tab, list tabs, snapshot, and stop.

phases.title: Post-Browser Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify browser automation did not leave the gateway degraded.
